productDisplayName: Puma Men Driving Power Lo SF Black Sports Shoes
description: These D Force Lo Scudera ferrari shoes from puma are a perfect choice for all speed freaks. These shoes, inspired by sleek Ferrari styling, are great for regular wear since their attractive design looks super hot when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Synthetic leather uppers with suede overlays for durability and protection Stitch detailing for added style and reinforcement Lace-ups for snug Fit Lightly padded collar and tongue for greater comfort Textile lining for extra comfort cat logo embroiered on the tongue Stitch detailing in the form of formstripes on the sides Ferrari badge embedded on the lateral side of the heel Plastic heel cup with woven pattern Midsole Eco-friendly EcoOrtholite insole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioning EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber traction outsole with tyre tread pattern and heel bumper for better protection to the heel and better grip
